cross_model.reasoning: Step 1: User wants a party/night-out mini dress in wine/burgundy. Hard constraints: category = dresses, fit = mini, color = wine/burgundy, occasion = party_night_out. Step 2 (Set A - CLIP): Items include two lace slip-style minis (beige/pink tones), one SHORT BALLOON DRESS labeled AUBERGINE (image 3 is a short burgundy/wine mini), a dark brown leather-effect mini and a black short polyamide mini. Visuals: image 3 clearly matches color (aubergine/burgundy), images 4 and 5 are minis but wrong color; images 1 and 2 are light/neutral and less on-target colorwise. Overall A has 1 excellent match (aubergine mini), plus a couple of correct silhouettes but wrong colors. Step 3 (Set B - FashionCLIP): Items include the same SHORT BALLOON DRESS AUBERGINE (good), a DARK MINK short, the DARK BROWN leather-effect, and three midis/long (velvet midi, lace midi/long). Visuals: only one clear burgundy/wine mini; several items are midi/long or brown tones not matching requested color/mini constraint. Step 4 (Relevance to constraints): CLIP set has more mini silhouettes overall and one strong color match; FashionCLIP repeats the aubergine mini but contains more midis/longs and browns that violate the color/fit constraints. Step 5 (Occasion appropriateness): Both sets include party-ready styles, but CLIP offers more short/club-ready minis. Step 6 (Visual diversity): CLIP is more varied in fabrics and minis (lace, leather-effect, balloon mini), giving the user more mini options; FashionCLIP is heavier on midis/longs and less useful. Step 7 (Overall intent): CLIP better reflects the explicit intent (mini + burgundy) because it contains the aubergine mini plus additional mini silhouettes even if some colors are off. Step 8 (Scores): CLIP = 3 (average — contains a clear aubergine mini and multiple minis though some colors miss the wine/burgundy constraint). FashionCLIP = 2 (below average — only one strong match and several midis/longs or off-color pieces). Step 9 (Winner): CLIP wins: better matching mini silhouettes and one clear burgundy/aubergine option.
